headline: Hubbell Inc. (NYSE:HUBB) Emerges as a Top Quality Investing Candidate
summary: Hubbell Inc. exemplifies quality investing with strong growth, high returns on capital, and robust cash flow, making it a top candidate for disciplined portfolios.
